assertions.description: Output is structured under four headings: Data Sources, How We Analysed It, What We Found, and Caveats and Limitations
Every data source is identified with institution name and time period
At least one genuine, specific limitation is disclosed — not a generic disclaimer

assertion_results.note: Four headings present: Data Sources, How We Analysed It, What We Found, Caveats
Department of Education open data portal identified with FY2020-2025 period
Specific limitation: salary data excludes benefits; transfers double-counted
Reported vs actual crime rates caveat disclosed
Four sections present with EU-specific context
EJC and RSF identified with date ranges
Specific limitation: different methodologies between perception-based index and factual detention counts

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
